originalTitle: Dow Jones Futures: S&P 500 Regains 50-Day As Sandisk, Micron Soar; Google, Tesla Earnings Due
summary: The S&P 500 reclaimed key support as Sandisk, Micron and AI stocks led a broad rally. Google, Tesla earnings loom.
content: The S&P 500 reclaimed key support as Sandisk, Micron and AI stocks led a broad rally. Google, Tesla earnings loom.
chineseTitle: 道琼斯期货：标普 500 指数重拾 50 天涨幅，Sandisk、美光飙升；谷歌、特斯拉到期收益
chineseSummary: 随着 Sandisk、Micron 和 AI 股票领涨，标准普尔 500 指数重新获得关键支撑。谷歌、特斯拉财报临近。
chineseContent: 随着 Sandisk、Micron 和 AI 股票领涨，标准普尔 500 指数重新获得关键支撑。谷歌、特斯拉财报临近。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
